The Heart Collectors
events.description: Finalists at the International Folk Music Awards 2025, The Heart Collectors merge 60's and 70's Americana/Folk with Celtic influences, featuring four-part vocal harmonies, cello, banjo, mandolin, and guitar to create music ranging from bluegrass-inflected folk to ethereal soundscapes.

events.title: Lena Fjortoft, Grace Givertz, and Jasper Jones
events.performer: Lena Fjortoft, Grace Givertz, and Jasper Jones
events.description: An evening featuring three indie folk and Americana artists: Lena Fjortoft, whose music blends Americana, alt-folk and rock with ethereal vocals; Grace Givertz, a multi-instrumentalist from Florida whose indie folk compositions weave together folk, Americana and indie rock; and Jasper Jones, a Brooklyn-based non-binary artist whose debut EP explores themes of love and loss.

events.title: Windborne
events.description: Windborne is a vocal ensemble known for innovative arrangements and bold harmonies that draw on deep roots in global vocal harmony traditions. With 20 years of collective experience studying polyphonic music worldwide, the group brings old songs into the present while connecting audiences to history, distant places, and themselves.
